title: Lone Wolf and Cub: Sword of Vengeance
original_title: 子連れ狼 子を貸し腕貸しつかまつる
overview: Official Shogunate executioner Ogami Itto has been framed for disloyalty to the Shogunate by the Yagyu clan, against whom he now is waging a one-man war, along with his infant son, Daigoro.
